title: The Lady Who Offers Her Looking-Glass To Venus
content:
Venus, take my votive glass:
Since I am not what I was,
What from this day I shall be,
Venus, let me never see.
meaning:
"The Lady Who Offers Her Looking-Glass To Venus" is a quintessential example of Matthew Prior's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
